value: Best monetization model: hosted/managed service. Free self-host + Pro cloud tier at 2/mo with managed AI credits, cloud sync, accounts.
GTM priority order: Product Hunt > Hacker News Show HN > r/selfpublish > NaNoWriMo (November) > Dev Twitter build-in-public.
Onboarding friction: 7-step wizard + BYO API key + GitHub requirement. Each gate loses ~50% of potential users. Demo mode is critical.
Scriva's unique moat: open-source + context-aware AI + Git-native manuscripts + voice DNA. No competitor combines all four.
SECURITY: .env.local had hardcoded secrets committed. Always check git history after rotating keys. Never store secrets in code.
Target user is developer-writers: technical authors, dev bloggers writing books, indie hackers. NOT mainstream fiction authors yet.
